events.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
events.blurb: The legendary singer-songwriter, known for hits like "Hello" and "All Night Long", celebrates his 77th birthday.

angles.name: Lionel Richie Birthday
angles.copy: Seventy-seven years young for the legend that is Lionel Richie today. What's your go-to track for an 'all night long' singalong?

events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: The iconic "Girls Just Want to Have Fun" singer, Cyndi Lauper, celebrates her 73rd birthday.

angles.name: Cyndi Lauper Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 73rd birthday to the one and only Cyndi Lauper! Still rocking those vibrant colours and incredible vocals.

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: Remembering the incredible talent of George Michael, who would have celebrated his 63rd birthday today.

angles.name: George Michael Tribute
angles.copy: Thinking of the incomparable George Michael, who would have been 63 today. A true musical genius gone too soon, but never forgotten.

events.title: Michael Jackson's passing remembered
events.blurb: Seventeen years ago today, the world lost the King of Pop, Michael Jackson.

angles.name: Michael Jackson Anniversary
angles.copy: Seventeen years since we lost the King of Pop, Michael Jackson. His music continues to inspire generations.

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Ringo Starr Birthday
angles.copy: Peace and love to Ringo Starr, who turns 86 today! From The Beatles to his All-Starr Band, what's your favourite Ringo moment?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Brian May Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the legendary Dr. Brian May! Still shredding on that Red Special like no other.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Mick Jagger Birthday
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young for the incomparable Mick Jagger today. Still got those moves! What's your favourite Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Forty-five years ago today, MTV officially launched, with The Buggles' "Video Killed The Radio Star" being the first music video ever played.

angles.name: MTV Launch Anniversary
angles.copy: Forty-five years since MTV changed the game! And yes, The Buggles were right, but radio is still here, thriving. What was the first music video that blew your mind?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' anniversary soon
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, marking its 32nd anniversary this month.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: August is the month we celebrate Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turning 32. That album changed everything. What's your standout track from it?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, began 57 years ago today.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since the legendary Woodstock Festival. Three days of peace, love, and music that defined a generation. Wish you were there?

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley
events.blurb: Forty-nine years ago today, the world mourned the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley.

angles.name: Elvis Presley Anniversary
angles.copy: Forty-nine years since the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, left us. His legacy truly lives on.

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur
events.blurb: Thirty years ago today, influential rapper Tupac Shakur was fatally shot in Las Vegas.

angles.name: Tupac Shakur Anniversary
angles.copy: Thirty years ago, the music world lost an icon. Remembering Tupac Shakur and his powerful impact on hip-hop and beyond.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix
events.blurb: Fifty-six years ago today, the world lost the unparalleled guitar legend, Jimi Hendrix.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-six years since we lost the extraordinary Jimi Hendrix. His guitar wizardry remains unmatched.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' anniversary soon
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' on September 26, 1969, making its 57th anniversary this month.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: September marks 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover, those tracks... pure genius. What's your favourite side?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' legendary frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the effortlessly cool Chrissie Hynde! Still delivering those incredible vocals with The Pretenders.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The iconic Oasis and solo frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday
angles.copy: You know the drill. Happy 54th to the one and only Liam Gallagher. Biblical.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released 51 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem "Imagine" was officially released as a single in the UK 51 years ago today.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-one years since John Lennon's 'Imagine' gave us a vision of peace. A song that still resonates globally.

events.title: First iPod anniversary soon
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how we listen to music, making its 25th anniversary this month.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? October marks 25 years since Apple changed the game with its unveiling. How many songs did you cram onto yours?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: Today marks James Bond Day, celebrating the iconic film franchise.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Who's your favourite 007 and what's the ultimate Bond theme tune?
